Inverter 	Inverter
Inverter

Inverter
CPS SCA50/60KTL-T/EU
Chint Power String Inverter
High Return of the Whole Life Cycle
Three-phase string series invert-
ers 	products providing standard
configuration DC switch, integrated
DC combiner box, RS485/Wi-Fi/4G
communication, which can match
the requirements of different cus-
tomers, support 10% rated overload
which can efficiently decrease initial
investment of system.
Three-phase string inverters can
provide 99.0% maximum efficiency,
98.5% Euro efficiency, 99.5% MPPT
efficiency, advanced topology de-
sign and international known device
options, which can guarantee the
profits of the Whole Life Cycle.
String inverter can support remote
monitoring, fault diagnosis and soft-
ware upgrade, 7*24H after-sales
service can guarantee the mainte-
nance of the Whole Life Cycle.
Low Investment 	High Profits 	Maintenance Warranty
